aka: Yesterday My Friend Bought a Bike

writer.name: 拉蒙·曲尔歇尔 Ramon Zürcher

director.name: 拉蒙·曲尔歇尔 Ramon Zürcher

this_title: Gestern hat sich meine Freundin ein Fahrrad gekauft
trans_title: 昨天我朋友买了辆自行车
Yesterday My Friend Bought a Bike
introduction: A young woman is walking through the city. She meets a friend at a coffee shop. This friend tells her every detail about how she bought a bike the day before. The young women listens.
chinese_title: 昨天我朋友买了辆自行车
foreign_title: Gestern hat sich meine Freundin ein Fahrrad gekauft
